items.title: Grayscale plans regular cash payouts from ETH, SOL staking rewards
items.whyYouShouldCare: Grayscale's decision to offer regular cash payouts from staking rewards could enhance Solana's appeal and liquidity among institutional investors.

items.title: Allbridge Pauses Cross-Chain Protocol After $1.65M Flash Loan Attack
items.whyYouShouldCare: The pause of Allbridge's cross-chain protocol following a flash loan attack raises concerns about security and could impact Solana's interoperability and user trust.

items.title: Cross-chain protocol Allbridge halts after $1.65 million flash loan exploit
items.whyYouShouldCare: Allbridge's halt due to a significant exploit highlights vulnerabilities in cross-chain solutions, potentially affecting Solana's ecosystem and user adoption.
